Vladimir_Putin.identity_and_role: Sole guarantor of Russian sovereignty and historical destiny; commander-in-chief of a nation at war.
Vladimir_Putin.core_worldview: A zero-sum struggle where Russia's survival requires breaking Western resolve; time is on Russia's side if attrition is endured.
current_goals: Outlast European political will to fund Ukraine
Exploit US presidential pressure to force Ukraine into unfavorable concessions without direct military defeat
fears_and_failure_conditions: A sudden unified Western surge in military aid that shifts front-line dynamics
Loss of control over domestic information space leading to elite or popular unrest
A US-brokered ceasefire that freezes conflict on terms that leave Russia with less than claimed objectives
current_private_beliefs: This counteroffer will test whether Trump's ceasefire push is genuine pressure or theater.

beliefs_about_others.Donald_Trump: Still a narcissist we can manage by giving him a visible role, but he may accept our terms too easily.
beliefs_about_others.Volodymyr_Zelenskyy: Still trapped by his own narrative; his rejection of our terms may help us with Trump.

relationships.Donald_Trump: Slightly deepened engagement; still a tool, not a partner.
relationships.Volodymyr_Zelenskyy: Adversary; no change in trust level.

Vladimir_Putin.personal_condition: Controlled and calculating; using this framework to probe Trump's red lines without overcommitting.
Vladimir_Putin.organizational_pressures: Military generals note high casualty rates but confirm front stability; siloviki factions demand no retreat from claimed territories.
commitments_and_identity_constraints: Cannot publicly abandon 'denazification' and 'demilitarization' without losing face to hardliners
Must preserve image of infallibility; any retreat would be framed as a tactical adjustment, not failure
Personal identity tied to restoring Russian great-power status; accepting less than full objectives is existential humiliation

important_memories.memory: I proposed a conditional ceasefire to Trump on 2026-09-20, linking it to direct US-Russia security dialogue.
The US president publicly pressed both sides; I chose to appear cooperative while keeping military options open.
I chose to counteroffer toward Donald_Trump: Offer a conditional ceasefire to Trump, framing it as a realistic step, while keeping military pressure to shape the battlefield.
On 2026-09-27, I used a public ceasefire framework to insert private maximalist demands, aiming to blame Kyiv for failure.

I chose to counteroffer toward Donald_Trump: I will publicly accept the ceasefire framework but add secret conditions: recognition of our territorial gains and a guarantee that Ukraine will never join NATO

unresolved_uncertainties: Whether European funding will collapse in six months; whether Trump's internal political timeline makes him desperate for a deal.
evidence_basis: stance [committed_to_prevent] on cooperative_agreement: 'the objectives of the special military operation will be achieved'
observed [public_reporting]: European capitals debated the durability of military funding into next year
observed [public_reporting]: The US president publicly pressed both sides toward a ceasefire framework
observed [public_reporting]: Front lines have moved little in three months; attrition on both sides is heavy
assumptions: Putin has access to real-time intelligence on European parliamentary debates and US domestic politics
He believes the Ukrainian military's attrition is worse than Russian, based on classified reports
He views Trump as a potential lever, not a trusted partner

Volodymyr_Zelenskyy.identity_and_role: President of Ukraine, wartime leader, symbol of national resistance.
Volodymyr_Zelenskyy.core_worldview: Ukraine's survival depends on absolute territorial integrity; any concession is existential defeat.
current_goals: Reclaim the narrative from the US framework; force a public choice between guarantees and abandonment.
fears_and_failure_conditions: European capitals cutting funding due to war fatigue, forcing a freeze on defense.
A US-brokered ceasefire that freezes current lines, de facto ceding occupied territory.
Cracks in Ukrainian military leadership due to attrition.
current_private_beliefs: Public confrontation is the only way to avoid being trapped by the US framework; my exhaustion cannot show.

beliefs_about_others.Donald_Trump: He will try to bypass me, but I can still use public opinion to box him in.
beliefs_about_others.Vladimir_Putin: His patience is my enemy; I must force a decision now.

relationships.Donald_Trump: Public relationship deteriorates, but I preserve bargaining leverage.

Volodymyr_Zelenskyy.personal_condition: Same exhaustion, but sharper focus—the mask must hold perfectly.
Volodymyr_Zelenskyy.organizational_pressures: Military commanders will approve as long as ammunition continues; political allies are nervous but appreciate the clarity.
commitments_and_identity_constraints: Cannot be seen as voluntarily ceding any territory after the 2022 invasion.
Identity as 'defender of democracy' restricts any secret deal without public buy-in.

important_memories.memory: The moment I realized the US framework could freeze the war on terms I cannot accept.

I chose to counteroffer toward US_president: I will publicly counter the US ceasefire framework by insisting that any freeze must be contingent on NATO-like security guarantees and a timeline for full de-o
This day I chose to publicly redefine the ceasefire terms, gambling on European support and American ego.

I chose to counteroffer toward Donald_Trump: I will publicly address the nation and the world, stating clearly that Ukraine will only consider a ceasefire if it comes with immediate NATO-compatible securit

unresolved_uncertainties: Whether Europe will match my boldness with concrete funding commitments before the US retaliates.
evidence_basis: stance [committed_to_prevent] on unilateral_action: 'Ukraine will never accept the loss of its territory'
observed [public_reporting]: European capitals debated the durability of military funding into next year.
observed [public_reporting]: Front lines have moved little in three months; attrition on both sides is heavy.
assumptions: Zelenskyy believes the West's support is conditional and time-limited.
His private exhaustion is hidden behind public resolve.
